description: Perform a security audit by identifying all visits from the competitor company 'Nexus Industries'. Export the filtered list of visitors from 'Nexus Industries' to /home/ga/Documents/nexus_audit.csv. If CSV export is not available, export to a PDF or text file named 'nexus_audit.pdf' or 'nexus_audit.txt' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory, ensuring the file contains only the records for 'Nexus Industries'.
